recentTweets.text: From demanding accountability in the FSC and calling for an independent investigation into the ICE shootings to meeting families where they are, it was another busy week delivering for the #FightingFifth. Catch up on the rest of my week in #NikemasNotes! https://t.co/y1qRCOQfRz

Six years ago today, we lost the Conscience of Congress, my friend, predecessor, and mentor, Congressman John Lewis. Today, we reflect on his extraordinary legacy and unwavering commitment to justice, equality, and voting rights.
 
As Congressman Lewis reminded us, “Do not get https://t.co/3IebgOHvff

Same lies, different day.
 
Trump’s lies are an attempt to lay the groundwork for undermining the next election. They are a deliberate effort to erode trust in our democracy and intimidate voters. 
 
We'll keep fighting against every attempt to silence voters.

The All-In Decatur Back-to-School Bash was a hoot! 🦉 
 
#TeamNikema held a #CongressInYourCommunity event during the bash at Decatur High School to make sure #FightingFifth families know about the federal assistance my office can provide.
 
Have a great school year, https://t.co/fPAv0Oswwm

I joined @RepJayapal in demanding accountability for ICE's violent shootings. The American people deserve a full and independent investigation into the deaths, the fear these incidents have caused, and any efforts to deport eyewitnesses. We will not accept this administration's

FSC Democrats tried to subpoena Russell Vought, Acting Director of the CFPB. He’s required to testify before the committee twice a year, yet this was his first appearance in two years.  The American people deserve accountability. They’re not getting it from this administration. https://t.co/p54FlFV0qJ

Homeownership builds generational wealth, but too many families in the #FightingFifth and across the country are being priced out as hedge funds and corporate investors buy up homes.
 
The Protecting American Homes from Hedge Funds Act puts families first by leveling the playing https://t.co/SXWuXiLtpo

From #Decatur to the spotlight!

Congratulations to Decatur High School’s Jordan Walker on taking home the Home Run Derby title. 

The #FightingFifth is proud of you. Keep shining!

TikTok ❤️’s ATL! Same 🫶🏽

Thanks for a great afternoon at the TikTok #DiscoverAmerica Tour stop in the #FightingFifth, highlighting how millions of business owners use the platform to grow. 📈 https://t.co/70mFpz4b2O

Trump’s idea of “big yawn” policy, the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, went into law at midnight and is the most significant housing package in decades. 

Including two of my own provisions to boost generational wealth and continue to close the racial wealth gap, this

From supporting small businesses and creating jobs to protecting public safety, honoring the legacy of a mentor and movement leader, and expanding access to mental health care, it was another busy week delivering for the #FightingFifth. Catch up on the rest of my week in https://t.co/7WPaWD6fKl

As part of the Democratic Women’s Caucus’ From Founding to Future series, I convened women entrepreneurs to bring their lived experiences to Washington and shape policies that help small businesses grow.
 
In the #FightingFifth and across our country, women own more than 40% of https://t.co/Woq19kQvk3

As a former educator, I'll always believe in the power of literacy and giving every child the resources they need to succeed. #TeamNikema was at the Forest Park Library for another Congress in Your Community, connecting families with federal resources. That's how we show up in https://t.co/mLdJnjWF13

Georgia lost a giant with the passing of Larry Pellegrini.
 
Larry was a fearless champion for LGBTQ+ equality and progressive causes. He was a mentor, a coalition builder, and someone who helped shape generations of advocates, myself included.
 
During my early days lobbying at https://t.co/0K2WZzUR66

July is #BIPOCMentalHealthMonth.
 
In the #FightingFifth and across our country, everyone deserves access to quality mental health care. Nearly 1 in 5 U.S. adults experiences a mental illness each year, yet too many Black, Latino, Asian American, Native, and other historically https://t.co/FSz8jmQSwp

Innovation creates opportunity, and I'm fighting to make sure the #FightingFifth leads the way.
 
Mercedes-Benz's new Research & Development Hub brings hundreds of jobs and helps position Georgia at the forefront of vehicle technology and digital innovation. That's how we grow https://t.co/dd83zHUuO2

We fight in Congress, in our communities, and in the courts.

Trump’s election fraud conspiracies are an intimidation tactic. That’s why I condemned the assignment of FBI agents to Atlanta to investigate the 2020 election in a congressional oversight letter.

"Congress in Your Community” means meeting you where you are in the #FightingFifth! Join #TeamNikema at an event in your neighborhood this July. My office is here to help with federal agencies and answer your questions. See you soon! https://t.co/UKH5ujHfZI

The FBI's mission is to keep the American people safe, not waste taxpayer dollars to push election conspiracy theories.
 
That's why I sent an oversight letter demanding answers after reports that FBI field agents are being reassigned to Atlanta to revisit Georgia's 2020 election https://t.co/jpPQUr8S3S

Black women have always driven our economy, strengthened our communities, and led through every challenge. It's past time our workplaces and policies reflected that reality.
 
Thank you to @GBEF_ and @essencefest for creating space for an important conversation about the state of https://t.co/sjctQYF9l9

Wishing everyone in the #FightingFifth a safe and happy #FourthofJuly. Today, we celebrate our country, our community, and the shared values that bring us together as we continue to fight to secure freedom for every American. https://t.co/2qiB6nkgO4

From fighting for affordable housing to supporting HBCUs, advancing Black maternal health, and celebrating all that makes Atlanta shine, it was another busy week delivering for the #FightingFifth. Catch up on the rest of my week in #NikemasNotes! https://t.co/lj8Hicggx4

One hour to go!

At 1:40 PM CT, I'll be speaking at the #GlobalBlackEconomicForum on the state of the workforce for Black women.

Tune in to hear how i'm fighting from the #FightingFifth for Black women to thrive and lead.

Watch live: https://t.co/kLZ3ltkqxh

Today, I'll be speaking at the #GlobalBlackEconomicForum during the 2026 ESSENCE Festival of Culture at 1:40 PM CT. 🕟 
 
Black women continue to shape our economy, our workplaces, and our communities, yet too many still face barriers to opportunity and economic security.
 
From https://t.co/C5YaKq6amm

Trump lost the 2020 election. Georgia voters made their voices heard, and he's still trying to silence them.
 
Stop weaponizing the FBI. 
Stop intimidating Georgia voters. 
And stop undermining our democracy.

The conversations we have today will help shape the opportunities available tomorrow.
 
That is why I am looking forward to joining the #GlobalBlackEconomicForum at the #GBEFSUMMIT during the 2026 ESSENCE Festival of Culture.
 
From the #FightingFifth to communities across the https://t.co/khhd2I4qek

$32 billion in generational wealth is locked behind tangled titles across 44 states. That's why I introduced the HEIRS Act.

In Georgia, Black mothers are nearly three times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than their white https://t.co/2OhLFc5t8j

The housing crisis doesn't care if you're a Democrat or a Republican. Trump is withholding policies that will help working families keep a roof over their heads to push his attack on voting rights. The American people deserve better.

We need more leaders who reflect the communities they serve. That's why I hosted scholars from the Atlanta University Center Consortium's Center for Excellence in Public & Government Service (@AUCConsortium) as they visited Washington to learn more about public service and civic https://t.co/EMS33pH3UE

It should not have taken the Supreme Court to tell Trump that. It’s literally right there: “ALL persons born.”

The fight for our civil rights is an everyday one, and we'll keep

Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook is keeping her position after the Supreme Court ruled that Trump does not have the authority to fire a Federal Reserve governor. We already knew that, but I'm glad to see the Court confirm it.
 
Being president doesn't mean you can just "fire"

The Supreme Court just rejected the Republican National Committee's challenge and ruled that elections officials may count mail-in ballots that arrive after Election Day because in a true democracy, we count EVERY vote. 
 
Trump's war on mail-in voting is a symptom of his

Kicked off the day at the @ATLHBCUAlumni 5K in the #FightingFifth, where they're raising thousands of dollars in scholarships to support students pursuing higher education at our HBCUs.

Higher education is one of the surest paths to closing the racial wealth gap, and I will https://t.co/0YrdOoZTbs

From fighting for reproductive freedom and affordable homeownership to protecting voting rights and building an economy that works for everyone, it was another busy week delivering for the #FightingFifth. Catch up on the rest of my week in #NikemasNotes! https://t.co/I3fviGZCGS

This is what pure joy looks like. 🥹💙

We warned people what was at stake. We were told it couldn't happen. Today, https://t.co/nC9612AWPL

I stood Democratic leaders, the Reproductive Freedom Caucus, and the Democratic Women’s Caucus to stand with Shanette Williams and honor the memory of her https://t.co/LGxrpSybq4

I stand with my friend and colleague @RepLaMonica and https://t.co/A4QDyyXFkH

Housing affordability is a https://t.co/otDG5AaqBa

We’re in a housing crisis, and Trump canceled the signing of bipartisan housing legislation because he said it was “of minor importance.”
 
There’s nothing minor about struggling to keep a roof over your head.

I hosted leaders from Cox Enterprises (@coxenterprises) and Cox Automotive (@coxautomotive) to discuss the future of AI, innovation, and Georgia's workforce.
 
As technology continues to evolve, we must ensure innovation doesn't come at the expense of workers. With more than 900 https://t.co/58yKz7tlHD

Nothing like experiencing the #WorldCup with family right here in the #FightingFifth. ⚽❤️ Team USA had the day off, but we were still repping the red, white, and blue. 🇺🇸
 
Leslie, Carter, and I had a great time watching Spain take on Saudi Arabia as the #WorldCup continues here https://t.co/N7A3p3m24W

As Atlanta welcomed visitors from around the world, #TeamNikema hosted a Congress In Your Community and connected residents with resources. That's how we show up in https://t.co/ViVbZ0CL4q

 I’m especially thankful for my husband, Leslie. Seeing him show up every day as a https://t.co/72UbM7UzmS

Good music, good people, and good community. 🎶✊🏾
